hero.name: KAMAL

chatBot.greetingResponse: Hello! I am Kamal's virtual assistant. How can I assist you with his professional profile?

qa.answer: Kamal Mohamed Sorour is a passionate Frontend Developer specializing in modern web technologies such as React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
Kamal is highly proficient in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, alongside various other modern frontend development tools.
He has successfully built numerous applications, including this interactive portfolio. You can view more details in the Projects section.
You can reach out to Kamal via the contact form provided on this site or through his professional social media links.

skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: A modern frontend toolkit for building exceptional web experiences

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A showcase of web applications and professional software solutions
projects.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms to find what you are looking for.
projects.noResults: No projects found matching your criteria.

items.title: Yassify
items.description: Yassify is a premium online grocery store designed to provide a seamless, lightning-fast shopping experience. Built completely on the modern Next.js App Router, the project leverages Server Components, robust Client State Management, and a beautifully crafted UI using Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui.

items.title: Yass - Social Network
items.description: Yass is a modern, production-ready social networking platform designed to connect people seamlessly. It provides a robust, dynamic environment where users can share thoughts, engage with rich content, and interact in real-time, utilizing React Query for state management.

items.title: Kamal Sorour — Portfolio
items.description: A modern, bilingual (English / Arabic) developer portfolio built with cutting-edge web technologies. Features 6 custom themes, next-intl for type-safe translations, custom service worker for PWA support, interactive terminal bot, and rate-limited contact API.

items.title: Adasa
items.description: An elegant, interactive photography blog tailored for showcasing rich visual stories, featuring full RTL Arabic translation support, client-side routing, responsive category filtering, and smooth layout views built with React 19 and Bootstrap 5.

items.title: NutriPlan
items.description: A modular Single Page Application (SPA) health companion. Integrates a smart recipe search database, a packaged product barcode scanner utilizing OpenFoodFacts API, and a daily food log tracking calories and macronutrients locally.

items.title: QuizMaster
items.description: A modern, interactive trivia application fetching questions dynamically from the Open Trivia Database API. Features category selection, countdown timers, keyboard shortcuts, audio feedback, and local storage high score leaderboard.
